notes: B19 + correct tRPC v10 error format: [{"error":{"message":"...","code":-32600,"data":{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","httpStatus":400,"path":"message.newChat"}}}]. Previous attempts had wrong wrapper ({result:{error:{json:{...}}}}). Now using standard tRPC httpBatchLink error format without result/json wrappers. Content-Type: application/json, h2_end_stream=1. 프롬프트 입력은 clipboard paste 사용.
